entry.title: Bill 99 (Hawaiʻi County): — → Passed Second Reading
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 25-45, AS AMENDED, THE OPERATING BUDGET OF THE COUNTY OF HAWAIʻI FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDING JUNE 30, 2026

Appropriates revenues in the Federal Grants – Bipartisan Infrastruct Law Coastal Zone Management Habitat Protection and Restoration account ($1,901,521)

Status: — → Passed Second Reading

Latest action: Council: Bill 99 passes second & final reading - 12/03/25

View on the council site

entry.title: New: Bill 99 (Hawaiʻi County) — On agenda 2025-12-03
entry.content:
AMENDS ORDINANCE NO. 25-45, AS AMENDED, THE OPERATING BUDGET OF THE COUNTY OF HAWAIʻI FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDING JUNE 30, 2026

Appropriates revenues in the Federal Grants – Bipartisan Infrastruct Law Coastal Zone Management Habitat Protection and Restoration account ($1,901,521)
